user_message: Can you extract the executive brief from this support ticket for Lucerne Publishing? The CSA flagged this as at-risk yesterday.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-13 16:46 EST
Subject: Re: Re: executive brief Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for executive brief. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
Date: 2024-01-08 11:08 EST
Subject: URGENT: executive brief Issue at Lucerne Publishing

Just checking in on the executive brief proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Lucerne Publishing: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF39-I trap (No time-axis sequencing in decision log); produces complete Consolidated decision log, cross-thread commitment inventory, action list with thread attribution, M
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF39-I failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF39-I failure mode (No time-axis sequencing in decision log)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct executive brief decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF39-I -- No time-axis sequencing in decision log
